ground_truth.title: From Lawnmowers To Leaf-blowers: A Guide To Gardening Gadgets
ground_truth.author: Adrian
ground_truth.main_content: It's time to set aside those manual gardening tools, and explore the world of garden gadgets. Using electronic tools, you can make light work of many garden chores ranging from cutting hedges to clearing up leaves. This delves into a few different types of garden gadget worth owning and things to look for when choosing the right equipment. Examples of garden gadgets include lawnmowers which come in many different forms from push mowers to ride-on mowers to automated robot mowers. The most powerful mowers use petrol, while electric mowers are cheaper to buy and lighter. Grass trimmers, also known as a strimmer or weed eater, allow for more precise grass cutting using a rapidly spinning line to cut through grass and weeds. Electric hedge trimmers cut the work of trimming hedges in half using motorized serrated blades to cut through twigs and small branches. Pressure washers can be used to clean many outdoor hard surfaces including patios, decks, fences and walls using a high pressure stream of water to lift dirt and grime. Leaf blowers are able to quickly clear away leaves and debris from patios and lawns, much more convenient than using a rake or a broom. When choosing gardening gadgets, consider your individual needs. Think about which applications are truly useful to you: hedge trimmers are only useful if you have hedges in your garden, while a leaf blower is only useful if you get a lot of leaves. The price range of gardening gadgets can vary massively, from basic electric models for $100 to ride-on models for $3000. Electric tools are typically less powerful than petrol tools but are much quieter. Safety is paramount when operating electric or petrol powered tools, and only ever buy used garden gadgets from reliable sellers.
with: It's time to set aside those manual gardening tools, and explore the world of garden gadgets.
Using electronic tools, you can make light work of many garden chores ranging from cutting hedges to clearing up leaves.
Electric hedge trimmers cut this work in half using motorized serrated blades to cut through twigs and small branches.
Pressure washers can be used to clean many outdoor hard surfaces including patios, decks, fences and walls.
For yards in densely packed urban areas, consider electric tools – these are much quieter than their petrol counterparts.
